current_life_events: Recently came out as a transgender man to his conservative family, and they're threatening to withdraw college financial support; struggling to balance schoolwork and volunteering at the local LGBTQ+ center.
mental_state: Feeling overwhelmed and uncertain about his future, questioning his self-worth and ability to pursue a career in psychology.
why_bringing_these_up_now: The recent confrontation with his family and the pressure to conform to their expectations has triggered a mix of anxiety, self-doubt, and fear about his future, making these problems feel insurmountable.
